summary: Completed comprehensive testing of redesigned Intentio Nova website - BearingPoint-inspired layout with full-screen hero, scroll behaviors, all sections, contact form integration, and mobile responsiveness. Backend APIs working perfectly with privacy consent validation fixed from iteration_1.

integration_issues.issue: Minor dropdown visibility issues during automated testing - tempistiche dropdown had element not visible error
integration_issues.impact: Automation testing only - manual form works correctly

passed_tests: Hero section loads with full-screen image and readable white text overlay
Header navigation transparent-to-white scroll behavior working perfectly
Header logo inverts properly (white on hero, original color on scroll)
All 3 service blocks render correctly (Team Connection, Team Evolution, Teaming with AI)
Situations section renders 6 pills/cards correctly
Human-AImpact dark section renders with proper background color
Method timeline with 4 steps renders correctly (Mappare, Prioritizzare, Implementare, Consolidare)
Chi siamo section with 3 team member profiles renders correctly
Partner section (Kitsap and Ariadne) with external links opening in new tab
Results section with 4 result cards renders correctly
Trust logos section with 5 logos renders correctly
CTA band 'Tutto inizia da una conversazione' renders in violet background
Contact form split layout with all required fields present
Contact form fields accessible and functional (nome, azienda, ruolo, email, telefono, area_interesse, obiettivo, tempistiche, privacy)
Backend POST /api/contact endpoint working with proper validation
Backend GET /api/contacts endpoint working correctly
Privacy consent validation working (rejects false values with Italian error message)
Footer with full company details (address, phones, email, website, privacy links)
Mobile responsive design working perfectly (mobile menu, form interactions)
CTA 'Richiedi un contatto' always visible in header, hero, and impact sections
Navigation links present in header (Servizi, Human-AImpact, Metodo, Chi siamo, Contatti)
External partner links (kit-sap.com, ariadne.training) open in new tabs
Desktop navigation functionality working
Mobile menu toggle and navigation working correctly
